data.title: RED test: 818-bug corpus fixture generator produces valid sample-bugs.json
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Write test `test_corpus_fixture_generates_valid_json` BEFORE implementing the generator.

Given: `tests/fixtures/818-corpus/` directory does not exist yet
When: `bash tests/fixtures/818-corpus/generate-corpus-fixture.sh` is run
Then: `tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json` exists, is valid JSON, and contains an array with ≥100 bug records each having `bug_id`, `title`, `description`, and `stage` fields.

The test MUST FAIL (RED) before `generate-corpus-fixture.sh` is implemented.

## Test Approach
Given: fixture directory absent and generator not yet written
When: test checks generator output at `tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json`
Then: file absent → test fails with "sample-bugs.json not found" (RED state)

## Implementation Notes
Create `tests/scripts/test-818-corpus-fixture.sh` that:
1. Sources `tests/lib/assert.sh`
2. Verifies `tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json` exists (fails RED until generator runs)
3. Validates JSON structure: array, each record has bug_id/title/description/stage fields
4. Asserts array length ≥100
5. Asserts stage field is one of: preplanning/implementation-plan/sprint/commit/epic-closure

Update `.test-index`:
`tests/fixtures/818-corpus/generate-corpus-fixture.sh: tests/scripts/test-818-corpus-fixture.sh [test_corpus_fixture_generates_valid_json]`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — note: test is RED so suite runner must honor RED marker
  Verify: grep '\[test_corpus_fixture_generates_valid_json\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-818-corpus-fixture.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker present for test_corpus_fixture_generates_valid_json
  Verify: grep '\[test_corpus_fixture_generates_valid_json\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test fails (RED) when sample-bugs.json absent (expected state before T3)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-818-corpus-fixture.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
